sunnah_senin.name: Monday Fast
sunnah_senin.description: A Sunnah fast recommended by the Prophet (PBUH) every Monday. On this day, deeds are presented to Allah.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ يَوْمَ اْلاِثْنَيْنِ سُنَّةً ِللهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu sauma yaumal itsnaini sunnatan lillahi ta'ala.
niat.translation: I intend to fast on Monday, a Sunnah for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_kamis.name: Thursday Fast
sunnah_kamis.description: A Sunnah fast recommended by the Prophet (PBUH) every Thursday. On this day, deeds are presented to Allah.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ يَوْمَ الْخَمِيْسِ سُنَّةً ِللهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu sauma yaumal khamiisi sunnatan lillahi ta'ala.
niat.translation: I intend to fast on Thursday, a Sunnah for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_ayyamul_bidh.name: Ayyamul Bidh Fast
sunnah_ayyamul_bidh.description: Sunnah fast during the middle of the Hijri month (13th, 14th, 15th). Its reward is equivalent to fasting the entire year.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ اَيَّامَ اْلبِيْضِ سُنَّةً ِللهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu sauma ayyaamal bidhi sunnatan lillahi ta'ala.
niat.translation: I intend to fast on the White Days, a Sunnah for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_syawal.name: Shawwal Fast
sunnah_syawal.description: Fasting six days in the month of Shawwal after Eid al-Fitr. Its reward is equivalent to fasting the entire year.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ سُنَّةِ الشَّوَّالِ لِلهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu shauma ghadin 'an adaa'i sunnatis syawwaali lillaahi ta'aalaa.
niat.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow for the Sunnah of Shawwal, for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_arafah.name: Day of Arafah Fast
sunnah_arafah.description: Sunnah fast on the 9th of Dhu al-Hijjah for those not performing Hajj. It expiates the sins of the past year and the coming year.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ سُنَّةِ يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ لِلهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu shauma ghadin 'an adaa'i sunnati yawmi 'arafata lillaahi ta'aalaa.
niat.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow for the Sunnah of Arafah, for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_tarwiyah.name: Tarwiyah Fast
sunnah_tarwiyah.description: Sunnah fast on the 8th of Dhu al-Hijjah. It can expiate the sins of the past year.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ سُنَّةِ يَوْمِ التَّرْوِيَةِ لِلهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu shauma ghadin 'an adaa'i sunnati yawmit tarwiyati lillaahi ta'aalaa.
niat.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow for the Sunnah of Tarwiyah, for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_asyura.name: Ashura Fast
sunnah_asyura.description: Sunnah fast on the 10th of Muharram. It expiates the sins of the past year.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ سُنَّةِ يَوْمِ عَاشُورَاءَ لِلهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu shauma ghadin 'an adaa'i sunnati yawmi 'aasyuuraa-a lillaahi ta'aalaa.
niat.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow for the Sunnah of Ashura, for the sake of Allah.

sunnah_tasua.name: Tasu'a Fast
sunnah_tasua.description: Sunnah fast on the 9th of Muharram (before Ashura) to differ from the Jewish practice.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ سُنَّةِ يَوْمِ تَاسُوعَاءَ لِلهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu shauma ghadin 'an adaa'i sunnati yawmi taasuu'aa-a lillaahi ta'aalaa.
niat.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow for the Sunnah of Tasu'a, for the sake of Allah.

wajib_ramadhan.name: Ramadan Fast
wajib_ramadhan.description: Mandatory fasting for the full month of Ramadan. It is the fourth pillar of Islam.

niat.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ فَرْضِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ هذِهِ السَّنَةِ لِلهِ تَعَالَى
niat.latin: Nawaitu shauma ghadin 'an adaa'i fardhi syahri Ramadhaana haadzihis sanati lillaahi ta'aalaa.
niat.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow for the obligatory month of Ramadan this year, for the sake of Allah.

haram.name: Fasting is Prohibited
haram.description: It is prohibited to fast on Eid al-Fitr (1 Shawwal), Eid al-Adha (10 Dhu al-Hijjah), and the days of Tashreeq (11, 12, 13 Dhu al-Hijjah).

doa_berbuka.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْتُ وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
doa_berbuka.latin: Allahumma laka shumtu wa bika aamantu wa 'alaa rizqika afthartu birahmatika yaa arhamar raahimiin.
doa_berbuka.translation: O Allah, for You I have fasted, in You I believe, and with Your provision I break my fast, by Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

common.out_of_month: Daily schedule is only available for the active month.
common.hint_long_press: Long press on marked days for fasting details
